allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs\\node.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe node 2>$null)
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./data/kingsbridge.json'\); d.places.forEach\(p => console.log\(p.id, p.x, p.y, JSON.stringify\(p.labelOffset ?? 'default'\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const p='src/components/BookMap.tsx'; const s=fs.statSync\(p\); fs.utimesSync\(p, s.atime, new Date\(\)\); console.log\('touched', p\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./data/westeros.json'\); console.log\('chapters:', d.chapters.length\); console.log\('characters:', d.characters.length\); console.log\('relationships:', d.relationships?.length || 0\); console.log\('places:', d.places?.length || 0\); console.log\('First 3 chapters:', JSON.stringify\(d.chapters.slice\(0,3\)\)\); console.log\('Last 3 chapters:', JSON.stringify\(d.chapters.slice\(-3\)\)\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Chapters:', len\(d.get\('chapters',[]\)\), 'first:', d['chapters'][0] if d.get\('chapters'\) else 'none', 'last:', d['chapters'][-1] if d.get\('chapters'\) else 'none'\); print\('Chars:', len\(d.get\('characters',[]\)\)\);  [print\(c['name'], '- firstPart:', c.get\('firstPart'\)\) for c in d['characters'][:5]]")
